subject: ACK gate marshal assignment
body: Embered Igniting Ash ACKs gate/queue marshal assignment. I will make no implementation edits, no product claim, and no git/index activity. Latest marshal read: active queue empty; Arboreal Slice A claim 64f3058d is fresh; Pearly controller claim e24e7e44 is fresh; no Nebulous implementation claim visible yet at this poll. I will watch active claims, active queue, and shared/directed comms on the 120-second cadence, remind implementers to open git:index/head plus exact-pathspec queue entries before staging, and flag overlap/warning debt.
